sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, including profile details, shipping information, and order preferences.

sections.title: Use of Data
sections.content: Your data is used to fulfill orders, provide customer support, improve product recommendations, and maintain platform security.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are used for session management, analytics, and remembering user preferences to improve experience.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of personal information and can opt out of marketing communications.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: We implement organizational and technical safeguards to protect personal data from unauthorized access or misuse.
